generated_oml:
// C1: System Under Study
instance AECOBuildingDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Digital Twin system representing building infrastructures (academic, commercial, Living Labs) in AECO domain, integrating BIM models with real-time operational data for cyber-physical monitoring, simulation, and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment AECOBuildingEnvironment
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled environmental sensor capturing real-time temperature data for building optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled environmental sensor capturing real-time humidity data for building optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled sensor detecting occupancy status for adaptive building control systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled sensor monitoring lighting conditions for adaptive lighting systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled meter measuring real-time energy consumption across building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalHumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMStaticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model representing geometric, spatial, and functional aspects of buildings (3D geometry, component relationships, material properties)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelEnrichmentEnabler, BIMValidationEnabler
]

instance RuntimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data captured from IoT sensors (environmental conditions, occupancy, energy metrics) processed through Eclipse Hono/Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightingDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo IoTDataIngestionEnabler, DigitalTwinSynchronizationEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Embedded control logic models executing optimization algorithms (e.g., reinforcement learning for adaptive lighting systems)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMModelEnrichmentEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven process extending BIM models with device metadata (sensor IDs, control logic) for runtime capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMEnrichmentService
]

instance BIMValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Validation framework ensuring enriched BIM models comply with domain-specific constraints (sensor placement, control feasibility)"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMValidationService
]

instance IoTDataIngestionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time IoT data ingestion and bidirectional communication between PT and DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DigitalTwinSynchronizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto framework managing digital twin instances, metadata, and things (sensors/actuators) with standardized APIs"
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinSynchronizationService
]

instance ModelTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-to-model (M2M) and model-to-text (M2T) transformations generating runtime artifacts (middleware configs, visualization scripts)"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelTransformationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform enabling rich, interactive 3D visualization of building performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance BIMEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service extending BIM models with device metadata to enable runtime capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMEnrichmentInsight
]

instance BIMValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating enriched BIM models against domain-specific constraints"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMValidationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time monitoring of building operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing predictive analytics and optimization algorithms (e.g., reinforcement learning for energy efficiency)"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight, EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance DigitalTwinSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service maintaining continuous synchronization between physical twin and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationStatusInsight
]

instance ModelTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating runtime artifacts from BIM models via model transformations"
    DTDFVocab:provides TransformationArtifactInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of building performance via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BIMEnrichmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful enrichment of BIM model with device metadata"
]

instance BIMValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reporting validation status of enriched BIM model against domain constraints"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of building operational parameters (temperature, humidity, occupancy, energy usage)"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics results for operational optimization (energy consumption, visual comfort)"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of building systems (lighting, HVAC) based on predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SynchronizationStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of continuous synchronization between physical twin and digital twin"
]

instance TransformationArtifactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated runtime artifacts (middleware configurations, visualization scripts) from BIM model transformations"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building performance metrics and operational status"
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System integrating sensors, actuators, and controllers for bidirectional communication with digital twin"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment
]

instance AdaptiveLightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller managing adaptive lighting systems based on real-time occupancy and environmental data"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment
]

instance HVACControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller managing HVAC systems for energy efficiency and occupant comfort"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment
]

// C12: Multiplicities
instance ModularDigitalTwinFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular, service-oriented architecture enabling scalable deployment of digital twins for individual buildings or campus-wide systems"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment
]

instance FederatedDigitalTwinDeployment : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Deployment strategy supporting federated or distributed digital twins for specific building zones or campuses"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment
]

// C13: DT Services (Additional)
instance ScenarioSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling simulation and testing of design changes or operational adjustments before physical implementation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioSimulationInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing automated commissioning and bidirectional control of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides CommissioningStatusInsight
]

instance CustomServiceIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling integration of domain-specific plugins (IoT analytics, AI-driven recommendations) via extension points"
    DTDFVocab:provides IntegrationStatusInsight
]

instance ScenarioSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results of scenario simulations evaluating design changes or operational adjustments"
]

instance CommissioningStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of automated commissioning and bidirectional control operations"
]

instance IntegrationStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of custom service integrations and plugin deployments"
]

// C14: Environments
instance AECOBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment containing academic, commercial, or Living Lab buildings"
    base:contains AECOBuildingDigitalTwin
]

instance DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cyber environment hosting digital twin instances and runtime services"
    base:contains BIMStaticModel, RuntimeOperationalData, ControlLogicModel,
                   BuildingControlSystem, AdaptiveLightingController, HVACControlSystem,
                   ModularDigitalTwinFramework, FederatedDigitalTwinDeployment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction is enabled through **bidirectional communication channels** established via the **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware stack**. The DT system generates **control signals** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) based on real-time analytics or predefined optimization logic (e.g., reinforcement learning in **BOREALIS**) and transmits these signals back to the physical twin (PT) via the middleware. This interaction is supported by **standardized extension points** in the DT framework, allowing for modular integration of custom services (e.g., adaptive control strategies) that can dynamically adjust physical systems. The framework ensures low-latency communication to maintain synchronization between the virtual and physical domains."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT system operates primarily at **real-time synchronization scales**, aligning with the **millisecond-to-second** range for sensor data ingestion and control signal execution. The **BOREALIS** project’s reinforcement learning model iteratively refines control policies over **minutes-to-hours** based on post-occupancy feedback. While the system is designed for **low-latency interactions**, specific time-scale details (e.g., millisecond precision for certain operations) are not explicitly documented in the provided sources."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Model Repository**: Stores the **enriched BIM models** with device metadata (e.g., sensor configurations, control logic).
  2. **Middleware Layer (Eclipse Hono/Ditto)**: Facilitates **real-time data exchange** and **bidirectional communication** between the PT and DT.
  3. **DT Framework Core**: Manages **automated deployment**, **runtime synchronization**, and **service orchestration**.
  4. **Visualization Layer (Unreal Engine 5)**: Provides **interactive 3D interfaces** for facility managers and engineers.
  5. **Custom Service Plugins**: Integrated via **standardized extension points** to extend functionality (e.g., AI-driven optimization, predictive maintenance).
  The constellation is designed for **scalability** and **interoperability**, allowing DT instances to be deployed across **heterogeneous infrastructure systems** while maintaining consistency through **model-driven automation**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT system spans the **entire building life cycle**, from **design and construction** to **operation and refurbishment**. Key stages include:
  1. **Design phase**: The DT is initialized using **BIM models** enriched with device metadata (e.g., sensors, actuators) to create a virtual representation of the **as-designed** building.
  2. **Construction phase**: The DT is updated to reflect **as-manufactured** deviations (e.g., material substitutions, spatial adjustments) via model-to-model transformations.
  3. **Operation phase**: The DT evolves to represent the **as-operated** building, incorporating real-time data from sensors and user feedback (e.g., occupancy patterns, energy usage) to optimize performance.
  4. **Refurbishment phase**: The DT supports **adaptive reconfiguration**, allowing for the integration of new systems (e.g., retrofitted sensors, upgraded controls) without disrupting operations. The framework ensures continuity across these phases through **automated model-driven deployment** and **runtime adaptability**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **Semantic Alignment**: The DT maintains **high fidelity** by leveraging **BIM’s rich semantic model** to represent physical components and their relationships accurately.
  2. **Real-time Synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** ensures **low-latency data exchange**, minimizing divergence between the PT and DT.
  3. **Validation Mechanisms**: The **ODTE metric** quantifies the **entanglement** between the DT and PT, providing a measurable indicator of synchronization quality.
  4. **Uncertainty Management**: The framework incorporates **error handling** and **data normalization** to address inconsistencies (e.g., sensor failures, communication delays).
  5. **Verification and Testing**: The **Living Lab case study** demonstrates the DT’s validity through **real-world deployment**, where operational data is cross-validated with physical measurements. The framework also supports **simulation-based testing** to evaluate DT behavior under hypothetical scenarios."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system uses **Eclipse Hono** and **Eclipse Ditto** as middleware for real-time data exchange, enabling **bidirectional communication** between the physical and virtual worlds. The connection is established through **standardized protocols** supported by Hono and Ditto, though specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP) are not detailed in the document. The framework ensures **low-latency synchronization** for operational control and analytics."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin framework supports **horizontal integration** through **standardized extension points** for modular service integration, enabling interoperability with external systems. While specific external systems (e.g., ERP, CMMS) or standards (e.g., OPC UA) are not detailed, the architecture is designed to accommodate **third-party services** and **data exchange protocols** for broader ecosystem compatibility."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, primarily **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, to ensure compatibility with existing industry practices. The use of **Model-driven Engineering (MDE)** principles standardizes the deployment process, though specific standards (e.g., IFC, ISO 19650) are not explicitly mentioned in the document."
]
